title: DucksOnIce
description:
Just a small, cozy Minecraft Winter Modpack.
Join a world covered in snow. Build yourself a warm winter cabin and decorate it using items from a variety of mods. Perfect for creating a cozy winter atmosphere in Minecraft!
body:
![DucksOnIceBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4b5294ae3e19355262a2069fd8a1dcce892e149_0.webp)

# Winter Wonderland (Vanilla+Winter+Decoration)
_Hey there, i created this modpack for me and my Discord friends. But it turned out pretty nice, so i wanted to use the opotunity and share it with you._

This modpack offers a curated selection of decoration mods, perfect for creating a charming winter wonderland in Minecraft. Step into a world blanketed in snow and ice, where every map is designed to capture the essence of the season. Explore frosty landscapes, build your dream winter cabin, and add warmth and character with decorations from a diverse range of mods.

With no over-the-top mechanics or complex additions, this modpack is all about keeping it simple and cozy—an ideal project for you and your friends to relax, build, and embrace the peaceful beauty of winter in Minecraft.
